visual_description: A man lies prone on a wooden floor, his upper body visible as he rests his chin on his clasped hands. His gaze is directed forward, and his posture remains still throughout the frame. The scene is dimly lit, with the man’s patterned sweater and the grain of the wooden floor being the most distinct visual elements.
audio_description: The audio features a male voice with a high pitch and moderate pace, accompanied by heavy breathing and a gasp.
